Description: Overflow of water covering normally dry land
Preparedness: Keep emergency kit ready; Move valuables to higher places; Monitor weather alerts
Emergency: Move to higher ground immediately; Avoid walking or driving through flood water; Call emergency services if trapped

Description: Sudden shaking of the ground due to tectonic movement
Preparedness: Secure heavy furniture; Prepare emergency supplies; Identify safe spots
Emergency: Drop, Cover and Hold On; Stay away from windows; Evacuate carefully after shaking stops

Description: Powerful storm with strong winds and heavy rain
Preparedness: Secure loose objects; Store food and water; Follow weather updates
Emergency: Stay indoors; Avoid windows; Evacuate if authorities advise

Preparedness: Install smoke alarms; Keep fire extinguishers; Avoid overloading electrical outlets
Emergency: Evacuate immediately; Crawl under smoke; Call the fire department

Description: Large sea waves caused by underwater earthquakes
Preparedness: Know evacuation routes; Stay informed about warnings
Emergency: Move to higher ground immediately; Stay away from beaches until authorities declare safe

Description: Movement of rock, earth or debris down a slope
Preparedness: Avoid construction near steep slopes; Monitor rainfall
Emergency: Move away from the landslide path; Alert emergency services

Description: Extended period of extremely hot weather
Preparedness: Stay hydrated; Avoid outdoor activity during peak heat
Emergency: Move to a cool place; Drink water; Seek medical help for heatstroke symptoms
